mnemonics: W.U.R.E. = We Understand the Rules Expertly
K.I. = Keep In Mind the Initial State
keyPoints: 1. Use a Knowledge Representation (KR) system to store and organize domain knowledge
2. Represent the Wumpus World as a graph or tree data structure
3. Use heuristics and inference engines to reason under uncertainty
4. Define the initial state and the rules of the game
5. Use a decision-making algorithm to make moves and evaluate outcomes
6. Quantify uncertainty using probability theory or fuzzy logic
7. Use actuation to apply moves to the game state and update the world
